title: eriodictyon californicum subsp. glutinosum
intro: Eriodictyon californicum subsp. glutinosum, also known as California Yerba Santa, is a subspecies of the Yerba Santa plant, a shrub native to the western United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Eriodictyon californicum subsp. glutinosum include relief from colds, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as potential aid in reducing inflammation and improving circulation. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
